expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states the case focus cannot be verified due to missing Phase 6 artifacts: “The benchmark’s Phase 6 focus—final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording—cannot be verified because no Phase 6 runtime artifacts… are included in the evidence bundle.” It describes what should be demonstrated, but does not demonstrate/preserve layering/executable wording in an actual Phase 6 plan.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: The result.md and execution_notes.md are centered on Phase 6 contract/rubric and Phase 6 required artifacts (drafts/qa_plan_phase6, quality_delta sections, layering order, executable wording rules), and conclude inability to assess due to missing Phase 6 artifacts. This is aligned to evaluating Phase 6 even though evidence is insufficient.
